# Drift

> A small, testable SwiftUI coordinator for iOS 16+. Typed routes, modal slots, async results, deeplinks, Swift 6 strict concurrency. No dependencies.

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/chomaev-shamil/Drift/blob/main/README.md): install, quick start, full integration walkthrough.
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/chomaev-shamil/Drift/blob/main/AGENTS.md): condensed API surface, invariants, and patterns for AI assistants.
- [DocC](https://chomaev-shamil.github.io/Drift/): symbol reference and articles (Getting Started, Tabs, Deeplinks, Auth, Testing).
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/chomaev-shamil/Drift/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): release notes.

## Optional

- [Source](https://github.com/chomaev-shamil/Drift/tree/main/Sources/Drift): reading the source is fast — the whole library is ~250 lines.
